summary: A very nice show with a strong, into‑it Jerry and solid band performance; recording source and quality are not described.
review: The reviewer praises the concert as a very nice show, highlighting Jerry Garcia’s powerful playing and the rest of the group’s solidity. A fun note is made about Bob Weir’s vocal impersonation reminiscent of his later William Shatner routine. No details on the recording source or sound quality are provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, but it is positive (4 stars) and focuses on strong musical performance; no information on recording quality limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments about sound clarity, mix, or source type; assumed acceptable but unverified.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific remarks on set structure or pacing were made.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Sounds good, strong and fully into the music.
band_member_comments.Bob: Sang with a William Shatner‑style impression, adding a humorous surprise.
